series_metadata.series_description: Reports that may be created by agency staff on a scheduled (weekly, bi-weekly, monthly, annual, etc.) basis that are used individually or collectively to provide indicators on performance, growth, project success, accountability or as directed by management that are not required by law and set out in a specific retention schedule.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Maintain a minimum of two federal fiscal years from date of report. ; Electronic: Maintain a minimum of two federal fiscal years from date of report
